# services.wyoming

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.wyoming`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.wyoming.faster-whisper.package` | `package` | The wyoming-faster-whisper package to use. |
| `services.wyoming.faster-whisper.servers` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Attribute set of wyoming-faster-whisper instances to spawn. |
| `services.wyoming.faster-whisper.servers.<name>.beamSize` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | The number of beams to use in beam search. The default (`0`) will use 1 beam on ARM systems (assumes an ARM SBC) and 5 everywhere else. |
| `services.wyoming.faster-whisper.servers.<name>.device` | `one of "cpu", "cuda", "auto"` | Determines the platform faster-whisper is run on. CPU works everywhere, CUDA requires a compatible NVIDIA GPU. |
| `services.wyoming.faster-whisper.servers.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Wyoming faster-whisper server. |
| `services.wyoming.faster-whisper.servers.<name>.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Extra arguments to pass to the server commandline. |
| `services.wyoming.faster-whisper.servers.<name>.initialPrompt` | `null or string` | Optional text to provide as a prompt for the first window. This can be used to provide, or "prompt-engineer" a context for transcription, e.g. custom vocabularies or proper nouns to make it more likely to predict those word correctly. Only supported when the {option}`sttLibrary` is `faster-whisper`. |
| `services.wyoming.faster-whisper.servers.<name>.language` | `one of "auto", "af", "am", "ar", "as", "az", "ba", "be", "bg", "bn", "bo", "br", "bs", "ca", "cs", "cy", "da", "de", "el", "en", "es", "et", "eu", "fa", "fi", "fo", "fr", "gl", "gu", "ha", "haw", "he", "hi", "hr", "ht", "hu", "hy", "id", "is", "it", "ja", "jw", "ka", "kk", "km", "kn", "ko", "la", "lb", "ln", "lo", "lt", "lv", "mg", "mi", "mk", "ml", "mn", "mr", "ms", "mt", "my", "ne", "nl", "nn", "no", "oc", "pa", "pl", "ps", "pt", "ro", "ru", "sa", "sd", "si", "sk", "sl", "sn", "so", "sq", "sr", "su", "sv", "sw", "ta", "te", "tg", "th", "tk", "tl", "tr", "tt", "uk", "ur", "uz", "vi", "yi", "yue", "yo", "zh"` | The language used to to parse words and sentences. |
| `services.wyoming.faster-whisper.servers.<name>.model` | `string` | Name of the voice model to use. Can also be a HuggingFace model ID or a path to a custom model directory. When set to `auto` picks a default based on the {option}`language`, With {option}`sttLibrary` set to `transformers`, a HuggingFace transformers Whisper model ID from HuggingFace like `openai/whisper-tiny` or `openai/whisper-base` must be used. Compressed models (`int8`) are slightly less accurate, but smaller and faster. Distilled models are uncompressed and faster and smaller than non-distilled models. Available models for faster-whisper: - `tiny-int8` (compressed) - `tiny` - `tiny.en` (English only) - `base-int8` (compressed) - `base` - `base.en` (English only) - `small-int8` (compressed) - `distil-small.en` (distilled, English only) - `small` - `small.en` (English only) - `medium-int8` (compressed) - `distil-medium.en` (distilled, English only) - `medium` - `medium.en` (English only) - `large` - `large-v1` - `distil-large-v2` (distilled, English only) - `large-v2` - `distil-large-v3` (distilled, English only) - `large-v3` - `turbo` (faster than large-v3) |
| `services.wyoming.faster-whisper.servers.<name>.sttLibrary` | `one of "auto", "faster-whisper", "onnx-asr", "sherpa", "transformers"` | Library used for speech-to-text process. When set to `auto` picks a default based on the {option}`language`. |
| `services.wyoming.faster-whisper.servers.<name>.uri` | `string matching the pattern ^(tcp\|unix)://.*$` | URI to bind the wyoming server to. |
| `services.wyoming.faster-whisper.servers.<name>.zeroconf.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable zeroconf discovery. |
| `services.wyoming.faster-whisper.servers.<name>.zeroconf.name` | `string` | The advertised name for zeroconf discovery. |
| `services.wyoming.openwakeword.customModelsDirectories` | `list of absolute path` | Paths to directories with custom wake word models (\*.tflite model files). |
| `services.wyoming.openwakeword.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Wyoming protocol server for openWakeWord wake word detection system. |
| `services.wyoming.openwakeword.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Extra arguments to pass to the server commandline. |
| `services.wyoming.openwakeword.package` | `package` | The wyoming-openwakeword package to use. |
| `services.wyoming.openwakeword.refractorySeconds` | `signed integer or floating point number` | Duration in seconds before a wake word can be detected again. |
| `services.wyoming.openwakeword.threshold` | `integer or floating point number between 0.0 and 1.0 (both inclusive)` | Activation threshold (0.0-1.0), where higher means fewer activations. See trigger level for the relationship between activations and wake word detections. |
| `services.wyoming.openwakeword.triggerLevel` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | Number of activations before a detection is registered. A higher trigger level means fewer detections. |
| `services.wyoming.openwakeword.uri` | `string matching the pattern ^(tcp\|unix)://.*$` | URI to bind the wyoming server to. |
| `services.wyoming.piper.package` | `package` | The wyoming-piper package to use. |
| `services.wyoming.piper.servers` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Attribute set of wyoming-piper instances to spawn. |
| `services.wyoming.piper.servers.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Wyoming Piper server. |
| `services.wyoming.piper.servers.<name>.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Extra arguments to pass to the server commandline. |
| `services.wyoming.piper.servers.<name>.lengthScale` | `floating point number` | Phoneme length value. |
| `services.wyoming.piper.servers.<name>.noiseScale` | `floating point number` | Generator noise value. |
| `services.wyoming.piper.servers.<name>.noiseWidth` | `floating point number` | Phoneme width noise value. |
| `services.wyoming.piper.servers.<name>.speaker` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | ID of a specific speaker in a multi-speaker model. |
| `services.wyoming.piper.servers.<name>.uri` | `string matching the pattern ^(tcp\|unix)://.*$` | URI to bind the wyoming server to. |
| `services.wyoming.piper.servers.<name>.useCUDA` | `boolean` | Whether to accelerate the underlying onnxruntime library with CUDA. |
| `services.wyoming.piper.servers.<name>.voice` | `string` | Name of the voice model to use. See the following website for samples: https://rhasspy.github.io/piper-samples/ |
| `services.wyoming.piper.servers.<name>.zeroconf.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable zeroconf discovery. |
| `services.wyoming.piper.servers.<name>.zeroconf.name` | `string` | The advertised name for zeroconf discovery. |
| `services.wyoming.satellite.area` | `null or string` | Area to the satellite. |
| `services.wyoming.satellite.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Wyoming Satellite. |
| `services.wyoming.satellite.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Extra arguments to pass to the executable. Check `wyoming-satellite --help` for possible options. |
| `services.wyoming.satellite.group` | `string` | Group to run wyoming-satellite under. |
| `services.wyoming.satellite.microphone.autoGain` | `integer between 0 and 31 (both inclusive)` | Automatic gain control in dbFS, with 31 being the loudest value. Set to 0 to disable. |
| `services.wyoming.satellite.microphone.command` | `string` | Program to run for audio input. |
| `services.wyoming.satellite.microphone.noiseSuppression` | `integer between 0 and 4 (both inclusive)` | Noise suppression level with 4 being the maximum suppression, which may cause audio distortion. Set to 0 to disable. |
| `services.wyoming.satellite.name` | `string` | Name of the satellite. |
| `services.wyoming.satellite.package` | `package` | The wyoming-satellite package to use. |
| `services.wyoming.satellite.sound.command` | `null or string` | Program to run for sound output. |
| `services.wyoming.satellite.sounds.awake` | `null or absolute path` | Path to audio file in WAV format to play when wake word is detected. |
| `services.wyoming.satellite.sounds.done` | `null or absolute path` | Path to audio file in WAV format to play when voice command recording has ended. |
| `services.wyoming.satellite.uri` | `string` | URI where wyoming-satellite will bind its socket. |
| `services.wyoming.satellite.user` | `string` | User to run wyoming-satellite under. |
| `services.wyoming.satellite.vad.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable voice activity detection. Enabling will result in only streaming audio, when speech gets detected. |
